# Extração: 02-Why You Can't Be Steve Jobs

- **Fonte:** 02-Why You Can't Be Steve Jobs.pdf

---

When Steve Jobs took the stage, he carried a well-known story on stage with him.
Chances are you do not. This is why you must share of yourself whenever you are
speaking to an audience.
This lesson will explain how and why.
